Taking Revenge on Valakas Boromir:
I came here to fight Valakas, trusting Klein who pretended to be Fire Dragon's Watcher. I thought Valakas became much weaker.
But I was wrong. Now all of my allies are dead, and I cannot join them because of the Fire Dragon's curse.
I want to revenge my comrades, but I no longer have the strength to fight. All I can do is to send you to the Heart of Volcano instead of Klein, and I'll make him pay someday.
Go through the Heart of Volcano and you'll meet Valakas.
